title: From Normal Mucosa to Colorectal Cancer in Lynch Syndrome: Single-Cell Dissection of Cellular Heterogeneity and Communication Networks.
snippet: To generate a single-cell atlas of colorectal cancer (CRC) development in Lynch syndrome (LS), and to delineate the associated cellular reprogramming and intercellular communication networks. We performed single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) on matched normal mucosa, adenoma, and carcinoma tissues obtained from patients with LS. Following quality control....
